repo.description: Go binding for Pytorch C++ API (libtorch)

terms.context_snippet: `gotch` creates a thin wrapper to Pytorch C++ APIs (Libtorch) to make use of its already optimized C++ tensor APIs (3039) and dynamic graph computation with CUDA support and provides idiomatic Go APIs for developing and implementing Deep Learning in Go.
